title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Snapdeal Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Snapdeal Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Snapdeal Logistics! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Snapdeal Logistics:
Snapdeal Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal Logistics!
